recommendations.title: They Look Like People
recommendations.overview: Suspecting that people are transforming into malevolent shape-shifters, Wyatt flees to New York City to seek out his estranged childhood friend Christian.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Sleepers
recommendations.overview: Two gangsters seek revenge on the state jail worker who during their stay at a youth prison sexually abused them. A sensational court hearing takes place to charge him for the crimes.

recommendations.title: Shelby Oaks
recommendations.overview: A woman's obsessive search for her missing sister leads her into a terrifying mystery at the hands of an unknown evil.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Oddity
recommendations.overview: After the brutal murder of her twin sister, Darcy goes after those responsible by using haunted items as her tools for revenge.

recommendations.title: A Vigilante
recommendations.overview: A once-abused woman devotes herself to ridding victims of their domestic abusers while hunting down the one she must kill to be truly free.

recommendations.title: Braid
recommendations.overview: Two drug dealers on the lam seek refuge inside their mentally unstable friend’s mansion. But in order to stay, they have to participate in her elaborate, and increasingly dangerous, game of permanent make-believe.
